<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <dbupdate>
    <bioTemplate id="0" btTemplateno="0"  btTemplate="">
            <tag id="1"/> 
            <bioTemplateFormat id="2"/> 
        </bioTemplate>
  </dbupdate>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <dbupdate>
    <Master id="0" current="1" displayName="Jon AKA Doe" mstExpiryDate="20201009" firstName="Jon" gender="M" idnumber="11144411" lastName="Doe" mstStartDate="20180919">
    <tag id="0" tagAccessOverride ="1" startTime="0" startDate="0" tagCode="11144411" expiryTime="0" suspendWithAlarm="0" expiryDate="0" report="1" suspend="0" ordinal="1" specialEvent="0" tagCodeUntruncated="11144411">
      <tagType id="1" />
      <tagTypeUntruncated id="15" />
    </tag>
   </Master>
   <withClause>tags</withClause>
  </dbupdate>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <dbupdate>
    <tag id= "12" >
    <master id ="20"> </master>
    </tag>
  </dbupdate>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?> 
<protocol id="4" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"> 
<iprxmessage command="OPEN_DOOR" fixedadd="02010201" timeout="0" state="-1"/> 
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <dbupdate>
    <master id="10">
      <mastergroup id="0">
        <accessgroup id="5" />
      </mastergroup>
    </master>
  </dbupdate>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <dbupdate>
    <Master id="401" >
        <masterdetail id="0" mdValString ="test address" >
        <masterDetailType  id="15"> 
        </masterDetailType>
    </masterdetail>
   </Master>
    <withClause>masterDetails</withClause>
    <withClause>masterDetails.masterDetailType</withClause>
  </dbupdate>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
   <dbsearch searchQuery="select m from Master m" recordCount="10">
  </dbsearch>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
   <dbsearch searchQuery="select da from DevAction da join da.deviceImprox di join da.setting das where das.settingType = 1001 and di.devSla ='02010104' and das.nameOriginal like '%Action 1%'" recordCount="10">
  </dbsearch>
</protocol>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<protocol id="82945242" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol protocol.xsd" xmlns="http://www.identisoft.net/protocol" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <dbupdate>
    <tag id="-3"></tag>
     </dbupdate>
</protocol>
